name: default
description: Markdown sibling of the code-understanding walkthrough: a question/summary header, a numbered call sequence (location, description, optional code), a component list, and related references. Arrays are rendered to repeated sections before substitution.

slots.description: The question being answered, plus a short summary of the mechanism.
Ordered call-sequence steps; rendered to repeated sections.
What runs at this step and why it matters.
Representative source snippet for the step.
Component file path. Repeat the component row once per entry in the components array (see shape).
What the component is responsible for.
Related files worth reading, as a bullet list.

shape.callSequence[]: { location: string (file:line), description: string, code: string (optional) }
